song.title: Blessed Be The Name
song.lyrics:
[V1] 1) All praise to Him Who reigns on high, In majesty supreme, Who gave His life for man to die, That He might man redeem.
[C] Chorus Blessed be the name! Blessed be the name! Blessed be the name of the Lord; of the Lord!
[V2] 2) His name above all names shall stand, Exalted more and more, At God the Father’s own right hand, Where angel hosts adore.
[V3] 3) Redeemer, Savior, Friend of man Once ruined by the fall, Thou hast devised salvation’s plan, For Thou hast died for all.
[V4] 4) His name shall be the Counsellor, The mighty Prince of Peace, Of all earth’s kingdoms, Conqueror, Whose reign shall never cease.
song.author: William H. Clark
